---
title: "Von Bertalanffy Growth Model Analysis"
author: "Gustav Sundvor"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

Analysis of herring growth using the Von Bertalanffy Growth Model (VBGM).

## Methods

Data were fitted using the Von Bertalanffy Growth Model equation: $$L_t = L_∞(1 - e^{-K(t-t_0)})$$

## Results

```{r}
#| message: false 
#| warning: false
#| lable: setup

## Loading targets to run pipeline.
library(targets)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| lable: fitting VBGM model

tar_load(vbgm_model)
summary(vbgm_model)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| lable: results VBGM model

tar_load(vbgm_results)
vbgm_results
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| lable: plot VBGM model and sliced data

tar_load(vbgm_plotted)
vbgm_plotted
```
